3296560.name: Kopitiam Story
3296560.description:
Kopitiam Story is a cafe-management/life-sim game where players will wisely manage their days in ensuring the growth of their cafe business.

Be The Manager of Your Cafe!

Slowly build up your business model to obtain bigger cafe spaces. Decorate your cafe to suit the target audience suited for the area. Keep up with the coffee trends and carefully select which menus are the most profitable to your business.

Explore The Bustling Environments of Maplejaya City!

The game is set in the metropolis of Maplejaya City, where a diverse set of cultures mix and reside. Explore the city in your free-time and find new things to interact with. Unravel the stories behind the characters you find within the city and develop a sense of camaraderie bond with them.
3296560.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
